title: phlox albomarginata subsp. diapensioides
intro: Phlox albomarginata subsp. diapensioides is a rare alpine plant species belonging to the phlox genus, known for its white, pink, or purple flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Phlox albomarginata subsp. diapensioides is often used in tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
